description_long: This is a single-serving rolled cake slice with a spiral of light sponge cake and creamy white filling, dusted with powdered sugar and drizzled with chocolate on top. The cake is topped with a swirl of whipped cream and garnished with a slice of orange, a red berry, and a dark blueberry, adding vibrant color and texture. The exterior of the cake is slightly rough from the powdered sugar and chocolate drizzle, while the interior appears soft and airy. The cake sits on a dark, rectangular serving board that contrasts with the light tones of the dessert. The overall appearance is inviting and festive, suitable for a café or bakery display. The cake's compact size and decorative toppings make it visually appealing and easy to serve in urban food settings.
description: A rolled sponge cake slice with creamy filling, topped with whipped cream and fruit, dusted with powdered sugar and chocolate drizzle, served on a dark board.
description_view_0: The spiral of the cake and creamy filling are clearly visible, with the fruit and whipped cream topping prominent on top.
description_view_1: The side of the cake shows the chocolate drizzle and powdered sugar, with the fruit and cream topping viewed from above.
description_view_2: The opposite end of the cake reveals the spiral pattern and filling, with the fruit garnish visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: The back side of the cake highlights the chocolate drizzle and powdered sugar, with the fruit and cream topping seen from behind.
